title: Tri-Circle Brass Padlock – Key’d Alike, Solid Brass Body with Hardened Steel Shackle – Hardware Fittings Included (50mm)
features: Key’d Alike Design: Operate multiple locks with one key.
Solid Brass Body: Durable and corrosion-resistant construction.
Hardened Steel Shackle: Provides superior cut resistance.
Reliable Key Mechanism: Smooth, precise, and secure operation.
All Fittings Supplied: Includes matching keys and fixings.
description: The Tri-Circle Brass Padlock – Key’d Alike provides dependable security and convenience for both residential and commercial use. Designed for users who need to operate multiple locks with a single key, this padlock offers maximum practicality without compromising strength or performance. Constructed from solid brass, the body resists corrosion and ensures long-lasting durability in all weather conditions. The hardened steel shackle offers superior cut and saw resistance, providing extra peace of mind for securing lockers, gates, sheds, or storage units. Each lock in the set can be opened using the same key, making it perfect for schools, workplaces, or maintenance environments where key management is important. The smooth key mechanism ensures reliable operation and a tight, secure fit. Built to the trusted Tri-Circle standard, this padlock combines classic styling, solid construction, and versatile functionality for everyday security needs.
